exclusion_justification: Verilator line/branch/FSM/toggle coverage not available because the pre-compiled DUT .so was not built with --coverage flag. Functional coverage (19 bins) is used as primary metric. To enable code coverage, recompile NutShell RTL with: verilator --cc --coverage -Wno-fatal NutShellCache.v
note: Regenerate with DUTRegressionRunner on a compatible self-hosted runner; this file contains no measured 19-bin DUT coverage.
